statement.en: Single cell multiomics and chromatin architecture reveal human heart failure gene regulatory programs

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint (dated 2026-04-25, future-dated or recent) in single-cell multiomics and chromatin architecture. The findings are empirical/experimental and not yet peer-reviewed or established in canonical literature. Heart failure gene regulatory programs are under active investigation; claims require validation through independent replication and mechanistic confirmation. The work combines computational methods (cs.AI category) with biological discovery, making it provisional pending publication and community validation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 心不全は、3次元構造に刻まれた遺伝子発現の積分が臨界を超えるとき、その暗号が解ける。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 心臓の奥底で、3次元のループと微細な光点が、決裂と再生の分岐を織りなしている。
